topic: A hole in my backyard is deeper every morning, with no dirt piled beside it.
title: The Hole in My Yard Gets Deeper | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The hole in my backyard is deeper every morning, with no dirt.
scenes.image_prompt: A dark circular hole in a grassy backyard with no soil piled around it, dim morning light, soft fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It appeared near the back fence after a quiet weekend.
scenes.image_prompt: A weathered wooden fence behind a lawn with a small opening in the ground, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At first it was barely a dip.
scenes.image_prompt: A shallow depression in green grass under gray morning light, soft grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But each dawn the edges sank lower, the bottom out of sight.
scenes.image_prompt: A deepening dark pit in a lawn, the bottom lost in shadow, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I measured it with a rope.
scenes.image_prompt: A coil of rope beside a dark hole in the grass, low light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Twelve feet, then twenty, then the rope ran out.
scenes.image_prompt: A taut rope disappearing into a black hole in the ground, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I shone a flashlight down the shaft.
scenes.image_prompt: A flashlight beam pointing into a deep dark pit in a backyard at night, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Something at the bottom shifted away from my light.
scenes.image_prompt: A narrow beam of light vanishing into darkness inside a pit, faint movement, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every night now I hear soft digging from below.
scenes.image_prompt: A dark backyard at night with a black hole near the fence, dim moonlight, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning the hole had moved closer to my back door.
scenes.image_prompt: A dark pit in the grass just steps from a back porch door, dim dawn light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I filled it with concrete. By sunrise it was open again.
scenes.image_prompt: A broken patch of dried concrete with a fresh dark hole through it, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It was never being dug downward. It was being climbed up.
scenes.image_prompt: A dark opening in a lawn at dawn with disturbed grass at one edge, soft fog, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
